prompt: Surrealist dark fantasy fine art image, cinematic, hyperdetailed, Baroque style. Absolutely no text, numbers, labels, or written elements anywhere. A row of nine stone statues stands across the full width of the frame, each dramatically larger than the previous one. THE LEFTMOST STATUE: Absolutely tiny — no bigger than a human hand — but it stands atop a magnificent impossibly grand cathedral throne of pure gold that dominates the entire left side of the image. Around this tiny statue, an absolutely overwhelming ocean of worshippers — tens of thousands of tiny human figures — crowd, kneel, and prostrate themselves in every direction, packed so densely they look like a single heaving living mass extending to the horizon. Blinding golden-white divine light erupts from the tiny statue like a supernova. THE PROGRESSION RIGHTWARD: Each subsequent statue is dramatically larger in body but has a smaller throne, fewer worshippers, dropping off steeply and shockingly fast. THE RIGHTMOST STATUE: An absolute colossus so enormous its head is cut off by the top of the frame. It stands on bare empty ground — no throne, no pedestal, nothing. Not a single worshipper. Pure cold blue-grey darkness surrounds it. Rembrandt chiaroscuro lighting, dark baroque surrealism, hyperdetailed. No text, no numbers, no symbols anywhere.
metaphor: Nine statues increase in size left to right, but the tiniest commands thousands of worshippers while the colossal rightmost stands completely alone — power inverts size.
